Dr. Lecturer Volkswagen Foundation Fund Support for Member Sibel Karadağ’s Project

The project “

Doctors on the move: Transnational Research into Healthcare Migration (TREATMi)”

prepared in partnership with Humboldt University (the Berlin Institute for Empirical Integration and Migration Research – BIM) and Kadir Has University has been awarded funding by the

Volkswagen Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation and Welcome.

The project will be led by

Dr. Sibel Karadağ

, a faculty member of the Department of Political Science and International Relations.

Within the scope of the project, Izmir University of Economics will also take part as a partner organization.

The research project that is eligible for funding within the scope of the first phase will conduct a research with a budget of 48,800 Euros for 7 months. As of March 2025, it will be eligible to move on to the second phase, which will last 3-5 years and worth 1.5 million Euros.

We congratulate our teacher Sibel and wish her success in her research.
